'''lajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:numerally|numerally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:numerally|numerally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:lajate|lajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lajatesher|lajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajatesherĂ«m|lajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lajatero|lajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lajateshĂ«|lajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajateshĂ«m|lajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilajatero|gokilajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilajateshĂ«|gokilajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilajateshĂ«m|gokilajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golajankerom|golajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golajankeshĂ«|golajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golajankeshĂ«m|golajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golajankeya|golajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lajaterom|lajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajatemu|lajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lajateya|lajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilajaterom|gokilajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilajatemu|gokilajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilajateya|gokilajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:lajajate|lajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lajajatesher|lajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajajatesherĂ«m|lajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lajajatero|lajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lajajateshĂ«|lajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajajateshĂ«m|lajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilajajatero|gokilajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilajajateshĂ«|gokilajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilajajateshĂ«m|gokilajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golajajankerom|golajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golajajankeshĂ«|golajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golajajankeshĂ«m|golajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golajajankeya|golajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lajajaterom|lajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lajajatemu|lajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lajajateya|lajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilajajaterom|gokilajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilajajatemu|gokilajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilajajateya|gokilajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠte|lĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠtesher|lĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|lĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠtero|lĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|lĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|lĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠtero|gokilĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokilĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokilĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golĂŠjĂŠnkerom|golĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|golĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|golĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golĂŠjĂŠnkeya|golĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠterom|lĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠtemu|lĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lĂŠjĂŠteya|lĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠterom|gokilĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokilĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilĂŠjĂŠteya|gokilĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:lafjafte|lafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:lafjaftesher|lafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafjaftesherĂ«m|lafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafjaftero|lafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lafjafteshĂ«|lafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafjafteshĂ«m|lafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafjaftero|gokilafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilafjafteshĂ«|gokilafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafjafteshĂ«m|gokilafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:golafjafnkerom|golafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golafjafnkeshĂ«|golafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golafjafnkeshĂ«m|golafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:golafjafnkeya|golafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:lafjafterom|lafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lafjaftemu|lafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:lafjafteya|lafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokilafjafterom|gokilafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilafjaftemu|gokilafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokilafjafteya|gokilafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
